comment: Expansion #4 Step-2 fan-out, shape E (list-of-parents with type tags + query strings). Transcribed verbatim from scraper_sportsmansguide.py inline PARENT_PATHS (list of (path, type) tuples) on 2026-06-14, parity-proven byte-identical before flip. SG is a custom storefront (BigRiver/Algolia product IDs) behind a Cloudflare-style anti-bot wall, crawled with playwright_stealth; per-caliber sub-slugs trip the wall, so it crawls three usage-type parent productlist pages and normalize_caliber() buckets each product by title (same approach as firearmsdepot/underwood). The (path, type) tuples become parent_paths entries carrying their `type` tag (handgun/rifle/rimfire), used only as a log label. The d=/c= category facet lives in `query`, stored apart from `path` so the redirect guard ignores it. Not yet harness-validated; validation null until Step-3. Approved by Jon, Step-2 fan-out, 2026-06-14.
